name: stackql-provider-anthropic
description: StackQL providers for the Anthropic API surface: anthropic (user/inference) + anthropic_admin (Admin API), mastered from one factory pipeline

scripts.build: npm run prepass && npm run split && npm run normalize && npm run analyze && npm run generate && npm run guards
scripts.build-admin: rm -rf stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split && mkdir -p stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split && cp stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/*.yaml stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split/ && node node_modules/@stackql/provider-utils/bin/provider-dev-utils.mjs normalize --api-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split && node factory/scrub-unions.mjs --api-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split && node node_modules/@stackql/provider-utils/bin/provider-dev-utils.mjs analyze --input-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split --output-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/config && node node_modules/@stackql/provider-utils/bin/provider-dev-utils.mjs generate --input-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/source/split --output-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/openapi/src/anthropic_admin --config-path stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/config/all_services.csv --provider-id anthropic_admin --servers '[{"url":"https://api.anthropic.com"}]' --provider-config '{"auth":{"type":"custom","location":"header","name":"x-api-key","credentialsenvvar":"ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY"}}' --naive-req-body-translate --overwrite && node factory/post-pass.mjs --provider-root stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/openapi/src/anthropic_admin/v00.00.00000 && node factory/guards.mjs --provider anthropic_admin --provider-root stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/openapi/src/anthropic_admin/v00.00.00000
scripts.docgen: node factory/patch-provider-utils.mjs && node node_modules/@stackql/provider-utils/bin/docgen-utils.mjs generate-docs-v2 --provider-name anthropic --provider-dir stackql_anthropic_provider/provider-dev/openapi/src/anthropic/v00.00.00000 --output-dir stackql_anthropic_provider/website --provider-data-dir stackql_anthropic_provider/provider-dev/docgen/provider-data/anthropic && node factory/scrub-docs.mjs --docs-dir stackql_anthropic_provider/website/docs
scripts.docgen-admin: node factory/patch-provider-utils.mjs && node node_modules/@stackql/provider-utils/bin/docgen-utils.mjs generate-docs-v2 --provider-name anthropic_admin --provider-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/openapi/src/anthropic_admin/v00.00.00000 --output-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/website --provider-data-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/provider-dev/docgen/provider-data/anthropic_admin && node factory/scrub-docs.mjs --docs-dir stackql_anthropic_admin_provider/website/docs
